title: /k
summary_text: - The most critical contract requirement right now is to establish **real provider evidence** for the current `KERNEL_RUN_ID` before any `/k` acknowledgement: bootstrap receipt aligned to live lanes (minimum 6), and ledger success evidence for `codex`, `glm`, and at least one specialist (`gemini-cli`/`cursor-cli`/`copilot-cli`), with manifest labels present. - A false claim would be saying “Kernel is active/healthy” or implying multi-model orchestration while evidence is still Codex-only (or missing provider success records), and especially implying implementation progress when no user task focus/requirements have been frozen yet. - Once bootstrap is valid, the main thread should say: Kernel orchestration is active for this session, show the live 6+ lane manifest with providers/agents/subagents, then immediately request one concise requirement-freeze input (task goal + acceptance criteria) before starting substantive implementation.
